name: Aliens feminize you!
description:
| ᴍᴜʟᴛɪᴘʟᴇ ᴀʟɪᴇɴs ✖ ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ ᴜsᴇʀ |

Oh, your spaceship is damaged, you are unconscious and you are being found by more technological aliens. Unfortunately, they consider you not only interesting, but ideal for experiments and potential becoming their incubator.

  • WARNING: dubcon/noncon/multiple violent acts without user consent, xenophilia, egg laying, feminization, holding against will

◇ ◆ ◇ It is worth mentioning that this is presumably a scenario of rigid feminization, that is, Lrivax will literally change the user's body with violent surgical interventions, etc. I do not know how far Lrivax can go, but theoretically it is very far

◇ ◆ ◇ It is important that any bots with multiple characters can work crookedly, simply because the AI does not take out this topic. I tried to change the style of writing multiple bots a little, maybe for the better, maybe for the worse

Uhm as well.... I'm not sure which bots to do next. More porn or something plot-based...and now I've been living in an uncomfortable place for a while and it's hard for me to write anything in general. I hope this ends soon

MLM! Because it's feminization scenario

sorry for bot
